name: movie-ticket-booking-system
description: Distributed Movie Ticket Booking System - Microservices Architecture

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../gateway && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../movie-service && npm install && cd ../show-service && npm install && cd ../booking-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../ticket-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install
